title: ついに集まったチームメンバー！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've finally gathered enough members to form a
team, and we can now enter the Unity Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our training level will go up based on our team
ranking in the Unity Cup, so I'm hoping to win as
many races as possible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But first, I need to decide on a team name. I can
choose between the names the others suggested
and the one I came up with, Team Carrot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I fill in our name on the form as "Happy Hoppers."
That makes it official!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I fill in our name on the form as "Sunny Runners."
That makes it official!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I fill in our name on the form as "Carrot Pudding."
That makes it official!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I fill in our name on the form as "Blue Bloom."
That makes it official!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I fill in our name on the form as "Team Carrot."
That makes it official!
